title: Bonds Cap February Rally With Yields at Lowest Since 2022
description: US bonds wrapped up their biggest monthly rally in a year, with short-term yields falling to levels last seen in 2022, as investors sought refuge from mounting global risks and a selloff in stocks.
content: US bonds wrapped up their biggest monthly rally in a year, with short-term yields falling to levels last seen in 2022, as investors sought refuge from mounting global risks and a selloff in stocks.
